LanguageData.GlobalFireExtinguisher.label: Global Fire Extinguisher
LanguageData.GlobalFireExtinguisher.description: A global fire extinguisher that uses space folding technology to instantly transport fire extinguishing agents to all fire points on the map.
LanguageData.GlobalFireExtinguisher_mini.label: Global Fire Extinguisher (Portable)
LanguageData.GlobalFireExtinguisher_mini.description: A portable global fire extinguisher that uses space folding technology to instantly transport fire extinguishing agents to all fire points on the map.
